name: Note proposal
about: Propose a new topic for the vault
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal
assignees: janainacazuza
---

## Proposed concept

<!-- Short concept name in kebab-case. Example: string-pool-on-heap -->

## Target folder

<!-- Which of the folders below would this concept live in?
10_mechanisms / 20_decisions / 30_pitfalls / 40_patterns / 50_diagnostics / 60_code / 70_interview -->

## Actionability justification

<!-- Complete the sentence below:
"Without knowing this concept, a Java engineer would make the following incorrect code decision: ..."
If you cannot complete this sentence, the proposal probably does not pass the vault's filter. -->

## Primary technical source

<!-- Book, specification, JEP, Javadoc, technical paper. Do not use generic tutorials as primary source. -->

## Java version applicability

<!-- Does this concept differ in behavior between Java 21 and Java 25? If yes, briefly describe how. -->

## Level

<!-- At which professional stage does this knowledge become actionable? junior / mid / senior / staff -->
